title: BLIND SIGNATURE SCHEME BASED ON CHEBYSHEV POLYNOMIALS
author: Maheswara Rao Valluri
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: A blind signature scheme is a cryptographic protocol to obtain a valid signature for a message from a signer such that signer’s view of the protocol can’t be linked to the resulting message signature pair.This paper presents blind signature scheme using Chebyshev polynomials. The security of the given scheme depends upon the intractability of the integer factorization problem and discrete logarithms of Chebyshev polynomials.
steps_raw: A blind signature scheme is a cryptographic protocol to obtain a valid signature for a message from a signer such that signer’s view of the protocol can’t be linked to the resulting message signature pair.This paper presents blind signature scheme using Chebyshev polynomials. The security of the given scheme depends upon the intractability of the integer factorization problem and discrete logarithms of Chebyshev polynomials.
